scores.notes: The OCR output is generally very good. There are a few minor inconsistencies in the header repetition, but the data itself is well-preserved. The categories 'Fries Dips + Spreads Wraps Dressings' appear as a single line at the top, which might indicate a slight misinterpretation of a header or section break, but it doesn't significantly impact the readability of the tables. All numerical values appear correct and aligned within their respective columns.
